Terms of Service

These terms govern your use of Sweet Layers website and services. By using our services, you agree to these terms.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Sweet Layers website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.

2. Products and Services

Product Availability

We strive to provide accurate product descriptions and pricing. However, we reserve the right to:

  • Modify product descriptions and prices without notice
  • Limit quantities of products purchased
  • Discontinue products at any time

Order Acceptance

We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order for any reason, including but not limited to:

  • Product availability
  • Errors in product description or pricing
  • Suspected fraudulent activity

3. Pricing and Payment

Pricing

All prices are displayed in Thai Baht (THB) and include applicable taxes unless otherwise stated. We reserve the right to change prices at any time without notice.

Payment Methods

We accept the following payment methods:

  • Credit/Debit Cards (Visa, Mastercard)
  • PromptPay (QR Code)
  • Cash on Delivery (COD)

Payment Security

All payment transactions are processed securely through third-party payment processors. We do not store your complete payment information.

4. Shipping and Delivery

Delivery Areas

We currently deliver within Bangkok metropolitan area. Delivery outside this area may incur additional charges.

Delivery Time

  • Standard delivery: 2-3 business days
  • Same-day delivery: Available for orders placed before 12:00 PM
  • Weekend delivery: Available with additional charges

Delivery Issues

We are not responsible for delays caused by:

  • Incorrect address information
  • Recipient unavailability
  • Force majeure events

5. Returns and Refunds

Return Policy

We accept returns within 24 hours of delivery for the following reasons:

  • Wrong product delivered
  • Product damage during delivery
  • Food quality issues

Non-Returnable Items

The following items cannot be returned:

  • Customized orders
  • Perishable items after 24 hours
  • Items damaged by customer

Refund Process

Refunds will be processed within 5-7 business days after approval. Refunds will be issued to the original payment method.

6. User Accounts

Account Creation

When creating an account, you must:

  • Provide accurate and complete information
  • Maintain and update your information
  • Keep your password secure

Account Responsibility

You are responsible for all activities under your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

7. Intellectual Property

All content on this website, including but not limited to text, images, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of Sweet Layers and protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws.

You may not:

  • Use our content for commercial purposes
  • Modify or reproduce our content
  • Use our trademarks without permission

8. Prohibited Activities

You agree not to:

  • Use the website for any illegal purposes
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access
  • Interfere with website operation
  • Post harmful or offensive content
  • Spam or send unsolicited communications

9. Limitation of Liability

Sweet Layers shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from your use of our services. Our maximum liability shall not exceed the amount you paid for the products.

10. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold Sweet Layers harmless from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your violation of these terms or your use of our services.

11. Termination

We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to the service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.

12. Governing Law

These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Thailand, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

13. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

14. Contact Information

If you have questions about these terms, please contact us:

  • Email: legal@sweetlayers.com
  • Phone: +66 2 123 4567
  • Address: 123 Sukhumvit Road, Bangkok 10110, Thailand

Last updated: April 9, 2026
